cvs.extractedData: {"name":"Syed Abdul Haleem","email":"syedabdulhaleem0@gmail.com","phone":"0511062958","location":"Riyadh, Saudi Arabia","summary":"IT Support professional with hands-on experience in providing technical support, managing infrastructure, and supporting IT operations for diverse organizations. Skilled in end-user support, desktop management, and incident resolution, with proven ability in hardware/software troubleshooting, network setup, and supporting remote and on-site users. Experienced with ITIL processes, VIP support, and technologies including Active Directory, TCP/IP, VPN, as well as Network monitoring, performance optimization, and maintaining secure, reliable IT infrastructure.","education":[{"degree":"Master of Science","field":"Cloud and Network Security","institution":"University of Bolton","year":"September 2025 - July 2026"},{"degree":"Bachelor of Technology","field":"Computer Science and Engineering","institution":"Lords Institute of Engineering and Technology","year":"August 2018 - October 2022"}],"experience":[{"title":"IT Support Analyst (Remote)","company":"Badoor Al Emaar Company","duration":"July 2025 - Present","description":"Effectively managed and resolved an average of 10+ incidents per day via remote access tools and ticketing systems (ServiceNow). Managed user accounts, licenses, and security settings via Microsoft 365 admin center (Office 365). Performed remote device and policy management using Endpoint Manager. Investigated and resolved recurring connectivity issues by capturing and analyzing network traffic using Wireshark, handling advanced tickets escalated from first-line support. Assisted in configuring and troubleshooting remote-access VPNs for employees to ensure secure access to corporate resources."},{"title":"IT Support Specialist","company":"World Communication Services Company","duration":"December 2024 - June 2025","description":"Provided Tier 1 and Tier 2 technical support for internal users, ensuring swift resolution of hardware, software, and network-related issues. Support and maintained end-user devices, including desktops, laptops, printers, and VoIP systems. Managed user account administration through Active Directory and resolved access issues across internal systems and tools. Maintained and tracked IT assets using inventory management tools, ensuring accurate documentation and compliance. Supported onboarding and offboarding processes by provisioning hardware, configuring devices, and ensuring timely access provisioning. Delivered technical guidance to employees, contributing to reduced downtime and improved user satisfaction."},{"title":"Junior Cloud Engineer","company":"Innovative Technologies","duration":"February 2023 - November 2024","description":"Configured and maintained LAN/WAN networks, routers, and switches, ensuring secure and reliable connectivity. Performed network troubleshooting and monitoring to minimize downtime and enhance system performance. Managed and optimized Linux (Ubuntu) and Windows systems for performance and security compliance. Resolved intermittent connectivity and network bottlenecks by analyzing packet captures using different tools. Assisted in the installation and management of LAN and WAN setups to improve organizational connectivity. Deployed and managed remote-access VPNs to provide secure access for remote employees."}],"skills":["Desktop Support and Troubleshooting","IT Hardware Lifecycle Management","IT Infrastructure & Networking","IT Service Management","System Administration","Active Directory (AD) & User Account Management","TCP/IP Protocols & LAN/WAN","ServiceNow & Jira","Leadership & Team Management","Operations Management"],"languages":[{"name":"English","level":null},{"name":"Hindi","level":null},{"name":"Urdu","level":null}],"totalYearsExperience":2.33}
